disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Tiny pustules each centred exactly on a hair follicle with normal skin between, in friction/occlusion areas after sweating
trigger_question_examples: Is each spot centred on a hair, with normal skin in between?
Did it appear in the areas rubbed by tight sweaty clothing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, each little spot is around a hair with normal skin between them, exactly where my tight leggings rubbed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No recent hot tub / unchlorinated pool use
trigger_question_examples: Any recent hot tub, spa or unchlorinated pool use?
Have you been in a spa or shared warm water?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No hot tubs or spas — this was after running in sweaty tight gear.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No large deep painful lumps, spreading deep redness, or fever/chills (deeper-infection screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any spots merging into large deep painful lumps, spreading deep redness, or fever/chills?
Are any turning into big boils?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No big lumps, no spreading deep redness, and no fever — just the tiny spots.
